data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an extra layer of security by requiring verification via a second device.
data.technical_spec: Optional feature, uses SMS or authenticator apps for 2FA.

data.title: Encryption Key Management
data.description: Manages cryptographic keys securely to prevent unauthorized decryption.
data.technical_spec: Keys are stored on devices; only users have access to their own encryption keys.

data.title: Message Integrity Protections
data.description: Ensures that messages are not tampered with during transit.
data.technical_spec: Employs hash functions and digital signatures to validate messages.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Continuously monitors for suspicious activities and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: AI and machine learning algorithms to detect anomalies in message patterns.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular penetration testing and security audits to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Third-party security firms employed for comprehensive system audits.
